title: helichrysum marginatum
intro: Helichrysum marginatum, also known as Yellow Everlasting, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its yellow flowers and silvery-gray leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its ability to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Helichrysum marginatum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health conditions. Helichrysum marginatum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
